description_long: This house features a boxy, modern design with a flat roof and large grid-patterned windows dominating the front and side facades. The exterior is primarily smooth and white, with minimal ornamentation, emphasizing clean lines and geometric forms. The structure appears to be a single-story building with an open, spacious layout, and a prominent entryway set back from the main facade. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. There is a small, detached rectangular object nearby, possibly representing outdoor furniture or a utility structure. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with a focus on simplicity and functionality.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large grid windows, and a minimalist white exterior. The design emphasizes clean lines and open space.
description_view_0: Front view showing large grid windows, the main entryway, and a detached rectangular object to the right.
description_view_1: Side view with a solid white wall, grid windows on the left, and the detached object more centrally aligned.
description_view_2: Rear view with smaller windows, a back door, and the detached object on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with grid windows and a clear view of the flat roof and open patio area.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a flat overhang, minimal steps, and no decorative columns or porch.
